metadata.description: Claude Code plugins shipped from the github.com/xgodev/boost repository.

plugins.name: golang-boost
plugins.description: Skill for writing and reviewing Go code on top of github.com/xgodev/boost. Covers Iron Laws, Echo HTTP APIs, event-driven functions (Pub/Sub / NATS / Kafka), and the maintainer-side layout convention for adding new factory contribs / wrapper drivers / bootstrap adapters.
